ingredients.item:
COATED METHOD
28 ounces (794 g) firm tofu
2 tablespoons vegetable oil, plus more for deep frying
ingredients.original:
COATED METHOD
28 ounces (794 g) firm tofu
2 tablespoons vegetable oil, plus more for deep frying

ingredients.item: 2 ounces (50 g) minced lemongrass
ingredients.original: 2 ounces (50 g) minced lemongrass

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon minced bird's eye chili pepper
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon minced bird's eye chili pepper

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon vegetable or mushroom stock powder

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon sugar
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon sugar

ingredients.item: 2 tablespoons soy sauce
ingredients.original: 2 tablespoons soy sauce

ingredients.item: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced on the bias, for garnish
ingredients.original: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced on the bias, for garnish

ingredients.item: 2 or 3 sprigs of cilantro, for garnish
ingredients.original: 2 or 3 sprigs of cilantro, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1 large cucumber, sliced, for serving
ingredients.original: 1 large cucumber, sliced, for serving

ingredients.item: 1. Cut tofu into cubes about 1 by 2 inches (2.5 by 5 cm).
ingredients.original: 1. Cut tofu into cubes about 1 by 2 inches (2.5 by 5 cm).

ingredients.item: 2. Fill the bottom of a small or medium saucepan with about 1 inch (2.5 cm) of oil and heat over low heat. After about 3 minutes, check with a cooking thermometer to see if oil has reached 320°F (160°C). (You can also dip the pointy end of a wooden chopstick in the oil, and if a steady stream of bubbles appears around it, the oil is ready.) Carefully drop in tofu cubes, cooking in batches if necessary, and fry until golden brown (about 8 minutes).
ingredients.original: 2. Fill the bottom of a small or medium saucepan with about 1 inch (2.5 cm) of oil and heat over low heat. After about 3 minutes, check with a cooking thermometer to see if oil has reached 320°F (160°C). (You can also dip the pointy end of a wooden chopstick in the oil, and if a steady stream of bubbles appears around it, the oil is ready.) Carefully drop in tofu cubes, cooking in batches if necessary, and fry until golden brown (about 8 minutes).

ingredients.item: 3. With a slotted spoon, transfer tofu to a paper towel–lined plate to drain.
ingredients.original: 3. With a slotted spoon, transfer tofu to a paper towel–lined plate to drain.

ingredients.item: 4. In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over low heat. When hot, add lemongrass and chili pepper, and cook and stir until golden brown (1 to 2 minutes). Add stock powder, salt, sugar, and turmeric powder, and stir well.
ingredients.original: 4. In a medium skillet, heat 2 tablespoons of oil over low heat. When hot, add lemongrass and chili pepper, and cook and stir until golden brown (1 to 2 minutes). Add stock powder, salt, sugar, and turmeric powder, and stir well.

ingredients.item: 5. Add fried tofu and drizzle with soy sauce. Toss until well-coated, and then remove from heat.
ingredients.original: 5. Add fried tofu and drizzle with soy sauce. Toss until well-coated, and then remove from heat.

ingredients.item: 6. Arrange tofu on a platter, garnish with chili slices and cilantro, and serve with cucumber slices.
ingredients.original: 6. Arrange tofu on a platter, garnish with chili slices and cilantro, and serve with cucumber slices.

ingredients.item:
STUFFED METHOD
2 tablespoons vegetable oil, plus more for deep-frying
2 ounces (50 g) minced lemongrass
ingredients.original:
STUFFED METHOD
2 tablespoons vegetable oil, plus more for deep-frying
2 ounces (50 g) minced lemongrass

ingredients.item: 1 tablespoon minced leek or scallion (white part only)
ingredients.original: 1 tablespoon minced leek or scallion (white part only)

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon minced bird's eye chili pepper
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon minced bird's eye chili pepper

ingredients.item: 28 ounces (794 g) firm tofu
ingredients.original: 28 ounces (794 g) firm tofu

ingredients.item: 1 cup (240 ml) vegetable oil, for deep-frying
ingredients.original: 1 cup (240 ml) vegetable oil, for deep-frying

ingredients.item: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced, for garnish
ingredients.original: 1 bird’s eye chili pepper, sliced, for garnish

ingredients.item: 2 or 3 sprigs of cilantro, for garnish
ingredients.original: 2 or 3 sprigs of cilantro, for garnish

ingredients.item: 1 large cucumber, sliced, for serving
ingredients.original: 1 large cucumber, sliced, for serving

ingredients.item: 3 tablespoons soy sauce, for serving
ingredients.original: 3 tablespoons soy sauce, for serving
